clause_text: The annual payroll of $45,136 for CT class 8810, Location 1 is an estimate and is subject to audit after the policy period.
The CT classification 8810 controls the rating basis for Clerical office employees at Location 1; form WC 00 00 01 A edition 07 23 applies unless a state amendatory endorsement changes it.
Officer, member, volunteer, leased-worker, and subcontractor treatment for CT class 8810, Location 1 must be read with form WC 00 00 01 A edition 07 23 and the $45,136 remuneration entry.
The estimated premium of $189 is calculated from rate 0.42, experience modification 1.04, and schedule rating 0% for CT class 8810, Location 1.
